name: Ananda Development Public Company Limited
summary: Ananda Development Public Company Limited, together with subsidiaries, develops and sells various real estate projects in Thailand. It operates through Real Estate Development, Management of Real Estate Development Project, Construction Service, and Other segments. The company provides management services for real estate projects; house construction services; and real estate brokerage, sport club member, and other services, as well as sells food and beverages. It is also involved in the management of juristic person; manufacture and distribution of building materials; development of software; and media production activities, as well as provides academic seminar services. Further, the company engages in the provision of property rental and procurement of lessee services. Ananda Development Public Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Bang Phli, Thailand.
